title: centaurea sphaerocephala subsp. lusitanica
intro: Centaurea sphaerocephala subsp. lusitanica, also known as a type of knapweed, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea sphaerocephala subsp. lusitanica include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
